title: Supreme Court raises alarm over Punjab drug crisis, urges police to target big sharks instead of small players
description: The Supreme Court on Friday expressed deep concern over the growing drug crisis in Punjab and the alarming human toll of narcotics abuse.A Bench comprising Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi indicated that the situation may require structural as well as policy-level intervention, including the possible involvement of the Central government.It referred to a distressing incident to underscore the scale of the crisis.“See what we read.
